settings.heading: Where is Elite Ti based?
settings.row_content: We’re based in Thailand and ship globally — heavy volume goes to the U.S.

settings.heading: Are your kits real dry carbon?
settings.row_content: If it says dry carbon, it’s pre-preg, autoclave-cured, zero filler. No wet lay. No games. If it’s fiberglass or wet carbon, we say so up front.

settings.heading: How long does shipping take to the U.S.?
settings.row_content:
Standard air: 5–8 business days. Express available.

We’re also migrating large items (kits, fenders, bumpers) to ocean freight for the U.S. — this keeps prices low and reduces the tariff hit. Transit time is longer, but landed cost is cleaner.

settings.heading: Are duties or tariffs included?
settings.row_content: Yes — all U.S. orders include duties and export tariffs. We handle customs clearance on our side.

settings.heading: How much is shipping?
settings.row_content: It depends on item size and weight. See our Shipping Rates or Pricing Policy for full breakdowns. We’ll give you exact costs before you commit.

settings.heading: How do I install your kits?
settings.row_content: All parts are bolt-on or light prep. If you’re not cool with trimming, sanding, or adjusting brackets, take it to a shop that knows JDM installs — not a window tint place.

settings.heading: Do you offer discounts for shops or bulk orders?
settings.row_content: Yep. We’ve got tiered wholesale pricing. If you're a shop or reseller, hit us up to open an account.

settings.heading: Can I return parts if they don’t fit?
settings.row_content: Only if it's our fault. Everything is pre-fit verified before shipping. If your chassis is bent or your shop botches install, we’re not covering it

settings.heading: What’s the warranty?
settings.row_content: We inspect every part before it ships. If it arrives damaged, send photos within 48 hours. We'll sort it fast.

settings.heading: Can I customize a kit?
settings.row_content: Yes. We do custom builds, widebody conversions, and one-offs. Send us your specs and let’s build something wild.

settings.text: Let your customers know who you are, what you stand for, and how you make their journey smoother.

settings.title: Message
settings.placeholder: Tell us why you are contacting us.

settings.heading: Drop us a line.
settings.text:
Get more details from your customers by using custom fields in your contact form with text. The more data you know about your audience, the more you can tailor the shopping experience to their liking!

If you have a retail space, this is the ideal area to add your location and store hours.
